prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical portrait of a young woman in a bright modern indoor shopping mall, viewed from a slightly high, close-up perspective with subtle wide-angle distortion so her head and upper body feel near the camera. The character has a petite build, fair skin, soft blush, large brown eyes, a small neutral pouting mouth, and glossy dark brown bobbed hair with straight bangs and one side gathered into a high looped ponytail tied with a small blue band. She leans forward toward the viewer, shoulders slightly hunched in a shy pose, holding the edge of an off-shoulder white lace-trimmed blouse with her right hand; underneath, a turquoise floral camisole is visible. She wears a high-waisted denim skirt and carries a small white quilted shoulder bag with gold hardware on her left side. Include exactly 3 visible accessories on her: a silver ring, a pink beaded bracelet, and the white shoulder bag. The mall background should show a glass arched skylight ceiling, glossy reflective tile floor, storefronts, and softly blurred shoppers walking behind her; include readable but fictional store signs such as Lunessa and another partially visible boutique sign. Use warm sunlight streaming through the ceiling, bright highlights on the floor, soft rim lighting on hair and shoulders, detailed linework, delicate lace texture, glossy hair highlights, shallow depth of field, and a clean high-resolution anime illustration style. Character customization: dark brown, brown, off-shoulder white lace-trimmed blouse over a turquoise floral camisole, high-waisted denim skirt. Avoid nudity, keep the pose fashionable and non-explicit, no watermark, no extra text beyond store signage.

promptZh: 创作一张精致的动漫风格竖版人像，背景为明亮的现代室内购物中心。采用略微俯视的特写视角，带有轻微的广角畸变，使人物头部和上半身显得靠近镜头。角色身材娇小，皮肤白皙，面带柔和的红晕，拥有棕色大眼睛、小巧且表情中性的嘟嘟嘴，以及有光泽的深棕色波波头，留着齐刘海，一侧扎成高高的环状马尾，并系着蓝色小发圈。她向观众前倾，双肩微耸，姿态害羞，右手抓着露肩白色蕾丝边上衣的边缘，内搭可见绿松石色碎花吊带衫。她身穿高腰牛仔裙，左侧背着一个带有金色五金配件的白色小号绗缝单肩包。画面中需包含 3 个清晰可见的配饰：一枚银戒指、一条粉色串珠手链以及那个白色单肩包。商场背景应展示玻璃拱形天窗、光亮的反射瓷砖地面、店面以及身后模糊走动的购物者；包含可读但虚构的店招，例如 Lunessa 以及另一个部分可见的精品店招牌。使用透过天窗射入的温暖阳光、地面上的明亮高光、发丝和肩部的柔和轮廓光、细腻的线条、精致的蕾丝纹理、有光泽的头发高光、浅景深，以及干净的高分辨率动漫插画风格。角色自定义：深棕色, 棕色, 露肩白色蕾丝边上衣内搭绿松石色碎花吊带衫, 高腰牛仔裙。避免裸露，保持姿势时尚且非色情，无水印，除店招外无额外文字。
